---
title: "News"
description: "News from the Caravagna Lab"
---

::: {.page-intro}
<p class="eyebrow">Lab notes</p>

# New papers, people and ideas.

A lightweight record of the lab's activity—not a feed that requires weekly maintenance.
:::

::: {.content-note}
**Proposed cadence:** four to eight substantial updates per year. Each item can be a short Markdown file with a date, image and category.
:::

## Updates coming soon

Initial stories will be selected during the content review.
